Off Calendar Jun-16-2020 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT PAUL SHIAU'S MOTION TO VACATE DEFAULT.

No appearances made by the parties. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Defendant Shiau's motion to vacate the default entered on January 1, 2019 and ensuing default judgment entered on May 1, 2020 is granted. (See Word minutes for complete ruling.) The Court signs an order.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/EPS)

Notice Of Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Dec-03-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Paul S. Shiau.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Adriana P. Robles, CSR #1412. Telephone: 415-551-0332. Email: arobles@sftc.org.

Roozbeh Falahati, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Brian Hally, who was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Paul S. Shiau.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Negligence, Failure to Compensate for Hours Worked and Breach of Contract was filed on November 6, 2018.
Plaintiff's Summons, Complaint and Statement of Damages was personally served on defendant Paul S. Shiau on November 19, 2018.
Default was to defendant Paul S. Shiau was entered on January 7, 2019.
Statement of Damages was filed on October 1, 2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed on October 1, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Brian Hally, and against the defaulted defendant Paul S. Shiau, as follows:

I. Past Economic Damages - $334,825.00, which is comprised of the following:
$154,425.00 in unpaid wages;
$177,500.00 in unpaid regular wages; and
$2,900.00 in lost wages for wrongful discharge.

II. Costs - $450.00.

III. Attorney Fees - $8,600.00.

IV. Punitive Damages - $11,825.00.

Subtotal - $355,700.00.

Minus - $64,000.00 for plaintiff's duty to mitigate his damages.

TOTAL - $291,700.00.

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare the proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-17-2019 Continued To Jan-14-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
